texto: Big business is basic to the very life of this country and yet many -perhaps most - Americans have a deep-seated fear and an emotional repugnance to it. Here is monumental contradiction.
explicacao: Citação de David Lilienthal sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Big business is basic to the very life of this country and yet many -perhaps most - Americans hav…” articula reflexao, capitalism, business em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: Out of the best and most productive years of each man's life he should carve a segment in which he puts his private career aside to serve his community and his country and thereby serve his children his neighbours his fellow men and the cause of freedom.
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Lilienthal sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Out of the best and most productive years of each man's life he should carve a segment in which h…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a trabalho, ability, achievement, útil em momentos de achievement.
